title: The Middle Ages
description: A medieval world, with unique and innovative mods awaits you...
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/The_Middle_Ages/BH_The_Middle_Ages_Header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/the-middle-ages-modpack) version.** ## The objective of this modpack is none other than the implementation of medieval and thematic mods, making the games set in a past stage of History. Among the changes to highlight, we can announce the incorporation of dozens of combat mods, which obviously will have a lot to do with these old stages. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/The_Middle_Ages/BH_The_Middle_Ages_Summary.webp) It is an ideal modpack for all those lovers of the medieval, and without a doubt, the Minecraft experience will be completely renewed. Of course, the essence of the game will not be completely lost, since the implementation of mods that drastically change the game has been ruled out. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/The_Middle_Ages/BH_The_Middle_Ages_FAQ.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 5GB or 5120 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 6GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/The_Middle_Ages/BH_The_Middle_Ages_Images.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ePvzoi6l/images/cbb4ce89e978cd156d15fea539943f1c33ce6460.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ePvzoi6l/images/99ee06b60dbd4af897fbd96760f8f70aea638191.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ePvzoi6l/images/5815382a8e04da2140a59bb5b11fed1579f3adea.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
